title: strip stray display delimiters inside math payload
evidence: cluster: \] occ=3 books=3; \( occ=3 books=1; all are in already-math payloads where mode delimiters become undefined residuals
proposal: Layer 1 normalize: in normalize_tex, delete stray \\[ and \\] tokens; collapse stray \\( and \\) to literal parentheses inside math payload
risk: May alter literal delimiter text shown inside code-like math text; rely on corpus gate and override collateral if any
